title: quercus glaucoides
intro: Quercus glaucoides, also known as the Manchurian white oak, is a deciduous tree species native to China and Korea. The bark and leaves of this plant contain tannins and other bioactive compounds that possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus glaucoides are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Quercus glaucoides, such as tea and extracts, are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
